evals.prompt: I have 8 SDRs and about 200 inbound leads per week. How should I route them?
evals.expected_output: Round-robin routing design with SLA enforcement and capacity management

assertions.name: round_robin
assertions.description: Recommends round-robin as the appropriate model for equal distribution across 8 SDRs

assertions.name: speed_to_lead
assertions.description: Includes speed-to-lead SLA targets (e.g., < 5 min for demo requests)

assertions.name: capacity
assertions.description: Addresses capacity management — ~25 leads per SDR per week, overflow rules

evals.prompt: I need to set up territory routing for 4 AEs: NA West, NA East, EMEA, and APAC.
evals.expected_output: Territory routing design with geographic rules, named-account overrides, and fallback handling

assertions.name: territory_rules
assertions.description: Defines geographic territory assignment rules (which countries/states map to each territory)

assertions.name: geographic_routing
assertions.description: Explains how to route based on lead's geographic data (company location or IP)

assertions.name: named_accounts
assertions.description: Includes named-account override — assigned accounts take priority over geography

evals.prompt: I want to route high-score leads to senior reps and low-score leads to SDRs for qualification. We use HubSpot.
evals.expected_output: Score-based tiered routing with HubSpot workflow implementation

assertions.name: score_thresholds
assertions.description: Defines score thresholds for routing tiers (e.g., 80+ to senior AEs, 50-79 to standard, below 50 to SDRs)

assertions.name: tiered_assignment
assertions.description: Maps score tiers to specific rep pools or queues

assertions.name: fallback
assertions.description: Includes fallback rules for unscored leads or when a tier's reps are at capacity
